reviews.comment:
Esta bien. Tiene mesita afuera y bajada al rio. Pase con 35°c y no daba para quedarse un rato pero muy linda

(Translated by Google)
It's fine. It has a small table outside and a walk down to the river. I went there when it was 35°C and it wasn't exactly worth staying for a while, but it was very pretty.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación y comentario. Esperamos su pronta visita

reviews.comment:
Está ubicada en un lugar estratégico luego de la ruta del desierto. Servicios bien. Lo que me pareció carísimo fue tomar un café. Un poco caro pero lo que es lo que pagué hacer una semana por un café con leche y un tostado en un lugar con ondas en Belgrano (Caba) lo que me salía solo un café acá.
El resto bien. Se aprovechan del precio porque es la primera estación de servicio en 150 km

(Translated by Google)
It's strategically located after the desert route. The services are good. What I found incredibly expensive was the coffee. A bit pricey, but what I paid a week ago for a latte and a toasted sandwich at a trendy place in Belgrano (Buenos Aires) was the same price as just one coffee here.
The rest was fine. They take advantage of the price because it's the first gas station for 150 km.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCNy16TFpBEAE

reviews.comment:
Prefiero pegarme un corchaso a volver a cargar acá. Muy lento el servicio. La más lenta del país. Preferible quedarse sin nafta, llamar al remolque, esperarlo y que te lleve hasta Catriel.

(Translated by Google)
I'd rather take a cork than fill up here again. The service is very slow. The slowest in the country. It's better to run out of gas, call a tow truck, wait for it, and have it take you to Catriel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCeF83VkZREAE

reviews.comment:
El peor servicio, las colas son eternas. No es digno de YPF.

(Translated by Google)
The worst service, the lines are eternal. It is not worthy of YPF.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCeS1YaWZREAE

reviews.comment:
Es la tercera vez que paso y falta personal en la cocina.
Se llena de gente, tardan mas de 45 minutos para traer un pedido, igual para traer la cuenta.
Ahora para levantar el pedido son 3 personas muy ágiles.
La comida es exquisita y muy cara.

(Translated by Google)
This is the third time I've been here, and they're short-staffed in the kitchen. It gets very crowded, and it takes over 45 minutes to get an order, and the same for the bill. Now, there are three very efficient people taking orders. The food is delicious and very expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCaThYeVNREAE

reviews.comment:
Cargué sin problemas, pero en horas pico es imposible, se llega a esperar hasta una hora y media, no te aceptan la app ni te suman los puntos serviclub, el problema es la explotación a los pobres playeros que son pocos y trabajan sin parar… deberían tener más personal

(Translated by Google)
I charged without problems, but during peak hours it's impossible; you can wait up to an hour and a half. They don't accept the app or credit your Serviclub points. The problem is the exploitation of the poor gas station attendants, who are few in number and work nonstop… they should have more staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCNDVyR3dBRRAB

reviews.comment:
1 de enero 2023 se negaron a cargarme combustible después de rogarle por que estaba en reserva. Me pusieron un límite de 1000 pesos para cargar

(Translated by Google)
On January 1, 2023, they refused to refuel me after I begged them because I was in reserve. They put a 1,000-peso limit on my fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCbllya0lREAE
